supported_runtime_versions: Codex CLI and Codex app with plugin support
install: Install the plugin from .codex-plugin/plugin.json; the skills/ directory is registered automatically.
update: Pull the repository and reload the plugin; plugin.json version drives the upgrade.
uninstall: Remove the plugin from the Codex plugin list. No files outside the project are touched.
rollback: Reinstall the previously tagged commit of .codex-plugin/plugin.json and skills/.
limitations: Plugin skill discovery requires the Codex plugin runtime to be enabled for the workspace.
deprecation: None. Adapter is active and supported.
